methods.name: Hand Vein-Knuckle Authentication
methods.description: Composite biometric authentication method that combines hand vein patterns with knuckle shape features for authenticating users.
methods.requirements: Near infrared camera, Consistent lighting conditions

authenticator.name: Hand vein patterns and knuckle shape features
